message:
feat: add recorded VCR fixtures for integration tests

9 cassettes covering all e2e and agent integration tests.
Replay mode runs in <1s vs ~170s for live API calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
